description:
Add properly formatted figure captions using the 'Figure' label to the four images in the environmental report 'BrownfieldReport.docx'. Use the following captions:
- Image 1: 'Site Overview – Former Meridian Manufacturing Complex'
- Image 2: 'Soil Sampling Locations and Contaminant Concentrations'
- Image 3: 'Groundwater Monitoring Well Network'
- Image 4: 'Proposed Remediation Action Zones'
Generate a Table of Figures using the 'Figure' caption label under the 'TABLE OF FIGURES' heading on Page 2. Save the updated document to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\BrownfieldReport.docx'.

captions: Site Overview – Former Meridian Manufacturing Complex
Soil Sampling Locations and Contaminant Concentrations
